session_title: Final Closures: Storage Substrate & Profile Parity — Publication Report

blocking_findings_closed: F-001: Dirty file audit corrected (Phase 1.3 dirty count was verified at execution time)

F-003: Phantom Phase 0.5 removed from track list

F-005: Adapter internals exclusion added (adapter.ts:88,105 are intentional SQLiteAdapter wrappers)
2a/6a: Coordination tables missing from DDL - ensureCoordinationTables on startup + try/catch fallback
1a: DuckDB without -readonly flag - added -readonly to subprocess spawn args
1b: DuckDB no connection pooling - implemented maxConnections=4 pool with idle timeout
3a: FK audit LIMIT 1000 hiding orphans - replaced with COUNT-based detection, all rows fetched
5b: send_message recipient path traversal - allowlist pattern /^[a-zA-Z0-9._@-]+$/ added
